completed_features.description: User can sign up and log in so that notes are tied to their account
completed_features.notes: Email/password auth with bcrypt hashing and cookie-based sessions

completed_features.description: User can toggle between dark mode and light mode with persistence
completed_features.notes: next-themes provider with database persistence via server action

done_conditions.description: User can sign up with email and password and is redirected to the notes dashboard
done_conditions.notes: Sign-up form at /sign-up with Zod validation, creates user in SQLite, sets session cookie, redirects to /notes

done_conditions.description: User can sign in with existing credentials and see the notes dashboard
done_conditions.notes: Sign-in form at /sign-in with bcrypt password verification, sets session cookie, redirects to /notes

done_conditions.description: User can sign out and is redirected to the sign-in page
done_conditions.notes: Sign-out button in sidebar footer and settings page, destroys session cookie, redirects to /sign-in

done_conditions.description: Unauthenticated users are redirected to sign-in when accessing /notes
done_conditions.notes: Server-side auth check in /notes layout.tsx, redirects to /sign-in if no valid session

done_conditions.description: User can toggle between dark mode and light mode, and the preference persists across sessions
done_conditions.notes: ThemeToggle component using next-themes, persists to user record in database via server action

done_conditions.description: The app shell renders with a sidebar showing All Notes, Favorites, and Trash sections
done_conditions.notes: Responsive sidebar: persistent on desktop (md+), Sheet slide-out on mobile. Shows All Notes, Favorites, Trash nav items with icons

routes_or_screens.description: Landing/marketing page with hero section, feature highlights, and CTA buttons. Redirects to /notes if authenticated.
Sign-in form with email/password, link to sign-up. Redirects to /notes if already authenticated.
Sign-up form with name/email/password and Zod validation. Redirects to /notes if already authenticated.
Notes dashboard with sidebar navigation and empty state card. Auth-protected.
Trash view with empty state. Auth-protected via parent layout.
Settings page with account info, theme toggle, and sign-out button. Auth-protected.

how_to_run.web: cd web && npm run db:migrate && npm run dev

known_issues: Sessions are stored in-memory (Map) — they won't persist across server restarts. Acceptable for local dev with SQLite.
Node.js >= 20.9.0 is required (Next.js 16 requirement). Use 'nvm use 22' if available.
The Favorites nav link uses a query parameter (?filter=favorites) — filtering logic will be implemented in Sprint 2 with notes CRUD.
self_eval_notes: Build succeeds with zero TypeScript errors. All 6 routes render correctly. Auth flow works end-to-end: sign-up creates user, sign-in authenticates, sign-out destroys session. Theme toggle switches between dark/light modes. Sidebar shows All Notes, Favorites, and Trash sections with active state highlighting. Mobile responsive with Sheet-based navigation. Empty states display on notes and trash pages.
